system.benefit: Conceal small item in body cavity
system.description: The character's flesh or augmetics conceals a small compartment. This might be a pouch hidden under a flap of flesh or a chamber fitted into a cybernetic enhancement. The character may conceal one small item, no larger than a closed fist, within this cavity. Discovering this compartment requires success on a Difficult (–10) Search Test. If using a medicae scanner or auspex, the Difficulty is reduced to Ordinary (+10).
